title: EveryXDance
description: All mobs can dance now after killing enemies, surviving from a war, or breeding.
body:
# Abstract
This mod makes mobs dance after killing enemies, surviving from a war, or breeding. During their dance, they won't attack other mobs.

The mod is inspired by piglins' dance, and [hoglins' dance](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8UeeF4lMPnk)

It's just for fun.

# Configuration
You can edit `everyxdance-common.toml` to set dance time in seconds, mobs' willingness to dance, dance animation, and what type of mob can dance.
